docs.title: Professional Identity
docs.text:
With more than 30 years of experience in technology and transformation, I’ve honed a core capability: reading the present with clarity, identifying structural flaws, and assembling technological, organizational, and human building blocks to create global, durable, and replicable models.

My journey through big tech, AI, analytics, and distributed architectures has taught me how to design solutions that solve complex, large‑scale problems. Today, I apply this expertise to projects that truly matter—using technology as an amplifier of life, never as a substitute for it.

As a certified Scrum Product Owner and SAFe Agilist, I embody a deeply rooted Agile mindset: clear vision, collaboration, autonomy, simplicity, and value. I excel at transforming complex ideas into concrete, robust, impact‑driven solutions.

I believe in an innovation that respects natural systems, optimizes resources, and creates resilient models aligned with today’s economic, social, and ecological realities.

Inspired by life, for life.

docs.title: My Motto
docs.text:
My motto

“Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.” — Leonardo da Vinci And in my work, simplicity is not optional. If a solution isn’t simple to use, it has failed its purpose.

docs.title: Executive Summary
docs.text:
Across more than 30 years in software engineering, architecture, and large‑scale transformation, I have:

  • Designed and delivered complex distributed systems for demanding enterprise environments
  • Led multi‑team, multi‑organization initiatives, aligning architecture, delivery, and business outcomes
  • Bridged strategy and execution, translating abstract goals into concrete, scalable solutions
  • Combined technical depth with pedagogy, raising the maturity of teams and ecosystems
  • Worked at the intersection of cloud, AI, analytics, and integration with a systemic, long‑term lens

Technology, for me, is a lever for clarity, resilience, and meaningful impact.

docs.title: What Others Say About Me
docs.text:
Across more than two decades in the organization, I was recognized as a highly committed, motivated, and exceptionally reliable professional whose work consistently exceeded demanding expectations.

My employer highlighted:

  • Extraordinary judgement and brilliant solutions, consistently implemented with precision and impact

  • Excellent technical mastery, enabling rapid adaptation across departments and seamless integration into complex workflows

  • Outstanding customer‑requirements management, from initial analysis to the optimization of sophisticated deployment scenarios

  • Exceptional teaching, conceptual, and communication skills, which contributed significantly to global market success and consistently received excellent feedback

  • Very strong IT expertise, spanning design, development, implementation, monitoring, and maintenance of complex systems

  • An ability to understand complex situations immediately and deliver highly effective solutions, even under pressure

  • Exemplary organizational abilities, setting the right priorities in difficult and time‑critical environments

  • A calm, thoughtful, target‑oriented working style, marked by independence, rigor, and precision

  • Leadership across multi‑team, multi‑organization environments, establishing effective management and control processes

  • Architectural vision that reduced workload by 50%, cut complexity, and lowered maintenance costs

  • Cloud architecture enhancements that improved security, simplified integrations, and overcame vendor limitations

  • Deep professional expertise far beyond my core domain, paired with a strong ability to embrace change constructively and independently

  • Flawless behavior toward clients, managers, and colleagues, making collaboration consistently pleasant and productive

In their words, my contribution delivered excellent results, strengthened the company’s capabilities, and left a significant and lasting impact on both architecture and organizational maturity.

Architecture & Systems Design
docs.text: I design scalable, resilient, and user‑centric architectures across cloud, multicloud, and distributed environments. My work integrates automation, observability, and security into coherent, future‑proof systems.

docs.title: Product & Delivery Leadership
docs.text: I drive product strategy, roadmap execution, and cross‑functional delivery for large‑scale platforms. My leadership ensures alignment, prioritization, and measurable outcomes across global teams

docs.title: Innovation & Problem‑Solving
docs.text: I simplify complex environments, eliminate friction, and create high‑ROI solutions. My approach blends analytical rigor, design thinking, and operational minimalism.

docs.title: People & Ecosystem Leadership
docs.text: I lead multicultural engineering teams across continents, fostering clarity, ownership, and collaboration. I build environments where teams deliver consistently and sustainably.

docs.title: 100× Faster Cloud Delivery
docs.text: Automated the entire multicloud control‑plane deployment, reducing delivery time from weeks/months to 1–2 days and cutting operational costs dramatically.

docs.title: Multi‑Tenant CMDB Architecture
docs.text: Designed a scalable, multi‑tenant ServiceNow CMDB model enabling clean integrations, reduced maintenance, and long‑term extensibility.

docs.title: API Gateway for Multicloud
docs.text: Delivered the MMAPIGW platform, achieving 3× faster integrations and an 80% reduction in maintenance effort.

docs.title: Quality Assurance Automation
docs.text: Built a QA automation framework delivering a 10× ROI and significantly improving release stability.

docs.title: Global Engineering Leadership
docs.text: Led teams of 9–30 engineers across Europe, Asia, and the Americas, delivering complex transformations on time and at scale.

docs.title: Leadership Approach
docs.text:
I lead through clarity, structure, and empowerment. My focus is on:

  • aligning teams around a shared architecture

  • removing ambiguity and unnecessary complexity

  • enabling fast, informed decision‑making

  • balancing product value with technical debt

  • ensuring consistency across distributed teams

I combine strategic vision with hands‑on technical understanding, allowing me to guide teams through complex challenges without micromanaging

docs.title: Digital Transformation
docs.text:
I have led major transformations across cloud, ITSM, and automation ecosystems, including:

  • transitioning organizations from waterfall to Agile and SAFe

  • implementing DevOps and CI/CD across global teams

  • modernizing multicloud offerings and operating models

  • integrating monitoring, CMDB, and automation platforms at scale

My work consistently improves stability, reduces costs, and accelerates time‑to‑market.

docs.title: Core Competencies (Executive Summary)
docs.text:
• Strategic Leadership: organizational vision, stakeholder alignment, risk governance, global team orchestration

  • Architecture & Engineering: multicloud, Kubernetes, automation, ITSM/ITOM, observability, distributed systems

  • Data & AI: Python, SQL, PowerBI, vector search, RAG, LLM integration

  • DevOps & Automation: CI/CD, IaC, containerization, workflow automation

  • Cybersecurity & Digital Trust: DevSecOps, IAM, compliance, decentralized identity

  • Operational Excellence: business continuity, DR, large‑scale infrastructure operations

docs.title: Experience Snapshot
docs.text:
A 20+ year track record delivering:

  • global multicloud architectures

  • large‑scale automation frameworks

  • enterprise ITSM/ITOM modernization

  • cross‑continent engineering leadership

  • high‑impact digital transformations

  • long‑lasting operational systems (15+ years in production)

Recognized internationally for innovation and architectural excellence.

docs.title: Too Lazy to Read? Let AI Walk You Through My Journey
docs.text: Click the thumbnail to watch an AI‑generated deep dive into my professional path. It highlights key decisions, architectural insights, and the ServiceNow CMDB redesign project that introduced multi‑tenancy.

docs.title: Introduction
docs.text:
This collection brings together my position papers and analytical work on key innovation challenges and emerging technology opportunities, with a particular focus on the Swiss ecosystem.

The research explores systemic cultural barriers to innovation, the disconnect between academic research and industrial adoption, digital transformation in regulated environments, and the strategic potential of blockchain and decentralized systems.

Across these papers, I examine structural inefficiencies, propose actionable recommendations, and encourage cross‑sector collaboration to accelerate meaningful, sustainable progress.

Date Description 2025‑11‑11 Internet Computer Protocol (ICP) – Simple Web Server ICP Project: Architecture, Insights, Outcomes and Recommendations 2025‑11‑03 Internet Computer Protocol (ICP) – Native Cycle Refill in ICP: A Necessity for Mass Adoption 2024‑12‑07 Dossier électronique du patient (FR)
